case_title: CAMPBELL, LARRY VS GOODWILL LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO MARY EDINGTON AGENT/SERVICE GOODWILL IND. OF SAN FRANCISCO, MARIN & SAN MATEO RETURNED SIGNED
CERT MAIL SENT TO ROBERT PARDO AGENT FOR SERVICE GOODWILL LLC RETURNED SIGNED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT GOODWILL LLC GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT GOODWILL LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES, INC. DEFENDANTS GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF SF, SAN MATEO AND MARIN COUNTIES' REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED CASE AGAINST THOSE DEFENDNTS OFF CALENDARED, UNSERVED. GOODWILL INDUSTRIES LLC PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
